  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder accruedInterestAmount(RebookExecutionResponseAccruedInterestAmount accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument. Requirement of 15 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder accruedInterestAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RebookExecutionResponseAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount)
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument. Requirement of 15 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • activityId

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder activityId(String activityId)
      The id of the activity in the Ledger that represents this trade.

    • activityId

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder activityId(Optional<String> activityId)
      The id of the activity in the Ledger that represents this trade.

    • bondYield

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder bondYield(List<BondYield> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • bondYield

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder bondYield(Optional<? extends List<BondYield>> bondYield)
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • commissionAmount

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder commissionAmount(RebookExecutionResponseCommissionAmount commissionAmount)
      Commission amount of the execution. Requirement of 11 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision.

    • commissionAmount

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder commissionAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RebookExecutionResponseCommissionAmount> commissionAmount)
      Commission amount of the execution. Requirement of 11 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision.

    • executionId

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder executionId(String executionId)
      A ULID that uniquely identifies the execution.

    • executionId

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder executionId(Optional<String> executionId)
      A ULID that uniquely identifies the execution.

    • executionTime

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder executionTime(OffsetDateTime executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the execution took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • executionTime

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder executionTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> executionTime)
      Timestamp of when the execution took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • externalId

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder externalId(String externalId)
      Used to generate execution_id, should be unique on the day for each source_application caller.

    • externalId

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder externalId(Optional<String> externalId)
      Used to generate execution_id, should be unique on the day for each source_application caller.

    • grossAmount

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder grossAmount(RebookExecutionResponseGrossAmount grossAmount)
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Requirement of 11 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • grossAmount

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder grossAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RebookExecutionResponseGrossAmount> grossAmount)
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Requirement of 11 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • memo

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder memo(String memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • memo

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder memo(Optional<String> memo)
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • name

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder name(String name)
      The resource name of the execution.

    • name

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      The resource name of the execution.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder prevailingMarketPrice(RebookExecutionResponsePrevailingMarketPrice prevailingMarketPrice)
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder prevailingMarketPrice(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RebookExecutionResponsePrevailingMarketPrice> prevailingMarketPrice)
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • price

      public RebookExecutionResponseExecution.Builder price(RebookExecutionResponsePrice price)
      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.

      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.
